creator: o.hushchenkov@gmail.com
text:
Now I can customize colors with .Xdefauls like this:

*.foreground:	#c0c0c0
*.background:	#000000
*.cursorColor:	#e0e0e0

*.color0:	#000000
*.color1:	#b92222
*.color2:	#47aa06
*.color3:	#ce882f
*.color4:	#1f46a1
*.color5:	#85478f
*.color6:	#3e918b
*.color7:	#c0c0c0

*.color8:	#505050
*.color9:	#e93232
*.color10:	#72ea26
*.color11:	#eeb32f
*.color12:	#4f71e9
*.color13:	#b557bf
*.color14:	#3ec1bb
*.color15:	#f6f6f6

But colors from 16 to 255 can't be setup like this. With this part of patch I can do this.
